title: abutilon albidum subsp. fruticosum
intro: Abutilon albidum subsp. fruticosum, also known as White Flowered Abutilon or White Flowered Velvet Flower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Abutilon albidum subsp. fruticosum are numerous, including the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
